view.title: Jonga iSeva {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuthumela kwakhona i-imeyili yamkelo?
view.emailSentMessage: I-imeyili yamkelo ithunyiwe kwakhona. Jonga ibhokisi yakho yongeno.

reverseDns.title: Iiseting ze-DNS eguqukayo
reverseDns.changeWarning: Ukutshintsha kwe-DNS eguqukayo kuthatha ixesha eliyi-awa ukubonakala.

ipmiLive.title: I-IPMI IP
ipmiLive.description: Nika i-IP ephilayo kumhlawuli we-IPMI ekhonkxiwe kule-IP yakho kwaye ikhona kangangeeyure ezingama-24.

order.title: Odola iSeva
order.hostnameHelp: Sebenzisa igama lomamkeli ukuchaza iseva. Idomain ayifuneki ukuba iyafaneleka okanye ibhalisiwe. Uphawu olunye lwexesha lufuneka kugama lomamkeli. Eminye imizekelo: database.local, web.server okanye igama lakho.
order.passwordRequirement: Qaphela: Igama lokusebenzisa kufuneka linazo ubuncinane izinhlamvu ezisi-8, ühlamvu oluncinci, ühlamvu olukhulu, inombolo, uphawu olukhethekileyo.
order.autoRenewNotice: Isivumelwano siya kuvuselela ngokuzenzekelayo emva konyanga wonke ngo-{cost} ude urhoxise.
order.tosAcknowledgement: Ngokuphawula le bhokisi, uyavuma ukuba uyathenga iproducthi yesivumelwano evuselela ngokuzenzekelayo (Njengoko Imiqathango Echazwe Ngentla) kwaye ihlawulwa kwikhadi loLwabelwano oluphetheyo namhlanje. Ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa ukuvuselela kwakho ngokuzenzekelayo, unayifikelela kwiwebhu yomxhasi ukhethe inkonzo esebenzayo uwuloke isixhobo sokurhoxisa okanye uthumele imeyili ku: billing{'@'}interserver.net okanye usebenzise enye indlela echazwe kuMiqathango neeMeko. Ngokuphawula ibhokisi kwaye ucofe Beka i-odola yam ngezantsi, uyavuma ubuye wafunda, uyaqonda, kwaye uyavuma neMiqathango neeMeko neNqubela yaBuMfihlo bethu.
